recommendations.title: Henry V
recommendations.overview: In 1415, in the midst of the Hundred Years' War, the young King Henry V of England embarks on the conquest of France.

recommendations.title: Hamlet
recommendations.overview: Winner of four Academy Awards, including Best Picture and Best Actor, Sir Laurence Olivier’s Hamlet continues to be the most compelling version of Shakespeare’s beloved tragedy. Olivier is at his most inspired—both as director and as the melancholy D

recommendations.title: Sleuth
recommendations.overview: A man who loves games and theatre invites his wife's lover to meet, setting up a battle of wits with potentially deadly results.

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Kingdom of Heaven
recommendations.overview: After his wife dies, a blacksmith named Balian is thrust into royalty, political intrigue and bloody holy wars during the Crusades.

recommendations.title: Foolish Wives
recommendations.overview: A con artist masquerades as Russian nobility and attempts to seduce the wife of an American diplomat.

recommendations.title: Khartoum
recommendations.overview: English General Charles George Gordon is appointed military governor of Anglo-Egyptian Sudan by the Prime Minister. Ordered to evacuate Egyptians from the Sudan, Gordon stays on to protect the people of Khartoum, who are under threat of being conquer

recommendations.title: Downton Abbey
recommendations.overview: The beloved Crawleys and their intrepid staff prepare for the most important moment of their lives. A royal visit from the King and Queen of England will unleash scandal, romance and intrigue that will leave the future of Downton hanging in the balan

recommendations.title: The Duchess
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of 18th century aristocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, who was reviled for her extravagant political and personal life.

recommendations.title: Coming to America
